response.justification: Candidate is a versatile senior engineer with strong full-stack and systems experience, but the resume shows minimal alignment with the core requirements of this role. There is no demonstrated depth in Java/Kotlin, the Spring ecosystem, or JVM internals, and no evidence of IDE/language tooling work beyond brief C/C++ contributions to LabWindows/CVI a decade ago. The bulk of recent experience is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, which do not transfer directly to enterprise JVM IDE development.
strengths: Long track record on complex, large-scale codebases across diverse domains
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based)
Prior IDE-adjacent experience at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience
Java/Kotlin listed only as a skill with limited evidence of deep JVM work
Recent focus is TypeScript/Node and DLang, not enterprise JVM tooling
